Latifa bint Mohammed: During my visit to Sweden, I met with a distinguished group of female leaders from the public and private sectors leaders, where we discussed the role of women in leadership and decision-making, and the importance of empowering them to help shape the future and advance sustainable development. I also attended a roundtable discussion at the Vasa Museum with leading Swedish cultural and creative figures to explore the role of creative industries in city-building and enhancing quality of life. #IRGC has released footage of its retaliatory missile operation targeting the #US bases and assets in the region #IranWar‌

Iran's Foreign Ministry has condemned US strikes on southern Iran in the early hours of Wednesday as a flagrant violation of the UN Charter, confirming Iranian Armed Forces struck US assets in the region in retaliation.
Iran's IRGC struck a U.S. airbase in Al-Azraq, Jordan, on Wednesday, hitting four key targets, including F-35 fighter shelters and a command and control centre with long-range solid-fuel missiles.
